positive: A stylized, symmetrical mandala design featuring interconnected geometric shapes and stylized flora. The primary subject is a mesmerizing, abstract pattern that suggests celestial patterns and natural growth. Use a vibrant color palette of deep sapphire blue, emerald green, and shimmering gold accents against a stark, clean white background. Composition should be centered and highly detailed, designed as a seamless repeat pattern suitable for apparel. Emphasize clean silhouettes, intricate line work, and high contrast. The style should blend Art Deco symmetry with sacred geometry and natural watercolor elements. Perfect for high-quality screen printing, vector art quality.
